subject: Product Management
title: AI and the PM Role
description: A micro-lesson that makes AI and the PM Role usable.

hook.text: AI can write specs, analyze data, and generate prototypes. Will it replace product managers?

buildup.text: AI tools already draft PRDs, summarize user research, and predict feature impact from historical data.

discovery.text: What AI can't do: build relationships, make judgment calls in ambiguity, or inspire a team around a vision.

twist.text: AI won't replace PMs. But PMs who use AI will replace PMs who don't.

climax.text: The PM role is shifting from 'gatherer of information' to 'maker of decisions' — with AI handling the gathering.

punchline.text: AI gathers. Humans decide. PMs still matter.

quiz.question: How is AI changing the PM role?
options: AI handles data gathering, freeing PMs to focus on judgment and decisions
AI has no impact on product management
